series_metadata.series_description: Notifications from manufactured home park operators of changes to the manufactured home park. These records include, but are not limited to, manufactured home placement/removal reports, park inventories, change in licensed park lot notices, change in ownership notices, and closing notifications.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist, then the paper record shall be retained until one year after the relevant manufactured home park is closed or until one year after the record is superseded. ; Electronic: The record shall be retained until one year after the relevant manufactured home park is closed or until one year after the record is superseded., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
